column2: Test CAO Raises Level One Finding
column3: ["The CAA officer identifies non-compliance with safety requirements for UAS operations that could lead to an effect on the operation's safety. ", 'The CAA officer raises the level-one finding to the entity approval holder. ', 'The entity approval holder receives the level-one finding from the CAA officer. ']
column4: ['The CAA officer has identified a level-one finding. ', 'The level-one finding is sent to the entity approval holder. ', 'The entity approval holder has received the level-one finding from the CAA officer. ']
